items.q: What is the symbol for Neon?
items.explanation: The standard symbol for Neon is Ne.

items.q: What is the atomic number of Potassium?
What is the chemical symbol for Beryllium?
What is the symbol for Hydrogen?
items.explanation: The standard symbol for Hydrogen is H.

items.q: What is the symbol for Argon?
items.explanation: The standard symbol for Argon is Ar.

items.q: Carbon dioxide has the formula CO2.
items.explanation: This is standard introductory chemistry knowledge.

items.q: What is the symbol for Nitrogen?
items.explanation: The standard symbol for Nitrogen is N.

items.q: What is the atomic number of Silicon?
What is the atomic number of Boron?
Elements are made of only one type of atom.
items.explanation: This is standard introductory chemistry knowledge.
